layman_headline: Extreme fear grips the crypto market — patience is the smartest play right now.
layman_explanation: The crypto market is in 'Extreme Fear' territory with a score of just 25 out of 100, and it's getting worse. Bitcoin dominance is high at 56.4%, which means money is flowing out of smaller coins and into Bitcoin for safety. Most of the coins on our radar are either falling hard with ugly charts, or have already rallied and look overextended. There's no clean setup that offers both a good entry price AND momentum in our favor.
layman_action: Stay in cash for now. Watch Ethereum closely — if it dips to $1,800 support with RSI dropping below 35, that could be a strong buy opportunity. Don't chase anything in this fearful environment.
expert_reasoning: None of the swing candidates present a compelling risk-adjusted entry right now. BONK has a -2.0 chart bias with Three Black Crows and Bearish Marubozu — classic capitulation candles, but catching a falling knife in a meme coin during extreme fear with 56.4% BTC dominance is reckless. LDO has the best chart bias (+0.85) with Three White Soldiers, but it's already up 22% in 7 days and 51.7% in 5 days — the move is extended and the risk/reward ratio is only 0.38x. DEXE is overbought at RSI 71. INJ has poor risk/reward at 0.67x. ETH is the most interesting — RSI at 39 is approaching oversold (our most reliable signal at 80% win rate), but the chart bias is -0.70 with price below all MAs. The disciplined play is to wait for ETH to test $1,800 support and show a reversal candle before entering.
risk_factors: Extreme Fear trend is worsening (25 and declining) — markets can stay fearful longer than expected, leading to further drawdowns
BTC dominance at 56.4% actively suppresses altcoin performance — even good setups can fail when capital flows to BTC
No clear news catalyst to reverse sentiment — headlines are mixed with regulatory uncertainty and macro headwinds
watch_list: ETH price action at $1,800 support — a bounce with volume confirmation would trigger a BUY signal
Fear & Greed Index — if it drops below 20 or reverses above 30, it changes the calculus significantly
FTX $900M creditor distribution timing — large distributions can create short-term sell pressure across the market
market_context: The crypto market is in Extreme Fear (25/100) with a worsening trend. BTC dominance at 56.4% signals a risk-off environment where capital concentrates in Bitcoin at the expense of altcoins — a hostile backdrop for alt swing trades.
context_banner: Extreme Fear with rising BTC dominance demands patience — the best trade right now is no trade until a clear reversal signal emerges.

key_signals.description: Extreme Fear at 25 and worsening from 27 yesterday — markets are panicking but haven't shown signs of capitulation reversal yet.
ETH RSI at 39.4 is approaching the oversold zone where our historical 80% win rate kicks in, but hasn't crossed the 35 threshold for a high-conviction entry.
ETH derivatives reset coverage suggests positioning is clearing out, which often precedes a directional move — bullish if combined with a support bounce.
FTX distributing $900M to creditors could create near-term sell pressure as recipients liquidate recovered crypto assets across the market.
No candidate has both a bullish chart bias AND favorable risk/reward — LDO is bullish but extended, ETH has potential but is structurally bearish, BONK is in freefall.
